sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115590" key="yeusi/stuc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευσίστυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n115590.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hating falsehood,</tr_> epith of Apollo, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
